notes: Bulk-generation-first candidate created with built-in imagegen. QA, legal/license review, final approval, and runtime integration deferred until all candidates exist.
final_prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: relic icon set for Orbwalker
Primary request: production candidate relic icon sheet for boss/shop relics.
Subject: five fantasy relic icons in a horizontal sheet: molten mantle, golden idol, crown of chains, merchant compass, prism sigil relic. Each relic should have a distinct silhouette and premium magical feel.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D game relic icons, crisp inventory readability.
Composition/framing: five equal icon cells, centered objects, transparent-background cutout feel, no labels.
Lighting/mood: rare treasure reward, magical but readable.
Color palette: antique gold, obsidian, fire orange, chain steel, compass brass, prism cyan/violet.
Constraints: no readable text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no gore, no casino imagery, no tiny illegible ornament.
